title: Software Developer Building Technology That Matters
paragraphs: I'm a software developer passionate about creating technology that makes a real difference in people's lives. Currently pursuing my Master's in Computer Science at Case Western Reserve University, I combine technical expertise with a problem-solving mindset to build applications that are both powerful and easy to use.

My journey in tech spans mobile development, web applications, and machine learning. I've built Android apps from the ground up, developed disease prediction models using AI, and even created a blockchain-based ride-hailing system. What excites me most is taking complex technical challenges and turning them into intuitive solutions that anyone can use.

I thrive in collaborative environments where I can learn quickly, adapt to new technologies, and pay close attention to the details that make software great. Whether it's debugging code at 2 AM or designing a user interface, I'm driven by the satisfaction of solving problems and shipping quality products.
focus_title: What I Bring to the Table
focus: Strong foundation in Java, Python, Kotlin, and modern development frameworks
Experience building mobile apps (Android), web applications (Next.js, Django), and ML models
Hands-on work with Agile teams, including a project with Progressive Insurance
Published research on battery optimization through thermal analysis
impact: I turn complex technical ideas into simple, user-friendly products that create measurable impact.
closing: I'm actively seeking full-time software engineering opportunities where I can contribute to meaningful projects, grow alongside talented teams, and continue learning. If you're working on something exciting, I'd love to connect. Let's build something amazing together.
